summary: deep_loop_graph_query is registered and callable as an MCP tool, but no YAML, bootstrap, watcher, or after-tool auto-fire path was found.
deep_loop_graph_upsert is a real YAML workflow step for research/review, but it is conditional on latest iteration graphEvents.
deep_loop_graph_convergence auto-fires in deep-research and deep-review YAML workflows before inline stop voting.
deep_loop_graph_status is an MCP status handler and test surface, but no command workflow auto-fire path was found.
